notes: Instruments page actions + real redemption. Each investment/EMI card now has an 'Actions' menu (Redeem / Step up / Pause / Resume / Close). REDEEM routes through the existing Journal redeem modal, pre-filled with that investment and its current balance (editable for partial/full) — so it creates a REAL investment_redemption transaction that lands in savings on Journal + Projection + Net Worth (no duplicate redemption logic). CLOSE always auto-redeems the full balance: it adds a lifecycle close event (stops future contributions) AND, if the close month is at/before the current month, immediately opens the redeem modal pre-filled with the full balance to materialize it as a real journal entry; a future-dated close stays projection-only until it arrives. Step up/Pause/Resume open the timeline editor pre-set to that event type. Each card shows its event history as a list (e.g. 'Step to ₹15K · 2027-04', 'Close · 2026-06'). The tx modal now accepts a prefill (investment + amount + date + destination) so the Instruments page can drive it.
